args.Description: "Change object du message label font from font-medium to font-semibold"
args.Instruction: "Change font-medium to font-semibold in the label for objet du message"
args.ReplacementContent: "                                         <label className=\"block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 mb-1.5 uppercase tracking-wider\">objet du message</label>"
args.TargetContent: "                                         <label className=\"block text-xs font-medium text-slate-400 mb-1.5 uppercase tracking-wider\">objet du message</label>"
